arts.ttl: Fans all say the same thing ahead of Tottenham's Super Cup clash after PSG thrash Inter Milan in Champions League final
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain will face Spurs in the UEFA Super Cup, with the north Londoners hoping to get their hands on another trophy - having ended their 17-year drought last week.

arts.ttl: How PSG's 'perfect' gameplan blew Inter away - analysis
arts.sum: BBC Sport's Champions League analyst Nedum Onuoha explains how PSG's high press overwhelmed Inter Milan in the Champions League final at the Allianz Arena in Munich.

arts.ttl: PSG 5-0 Inter: A triumph for collective artistry over individual ability in Champions League final
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain's astonishing Champions League win is a triumph for the collective artistry of a cohesive unit over the individual ability of a group of superstars.

arts.ttl: Video: Inter fans abandon San Siro but applaud PSG
arts.sum: Several Inter fans left San Siro when PSG scored the fourth goal in the Champions...

arts.ttl: PSG 5-0 Inter Milan: Desire Doue stars as Luis Enrique's side win Champions League for first time
arts.sum: PSG thrashed Inter Milan 5-0 to win the Champions League for the first time; Luis Enriques side also completed a historic treble with victory in Munich; Desire Doue scored twice, with Achraf Hakimi, Khvicha Kvaratskhelia and Senny Mayulu also netting

arts.ttl: PSG 5–0 Inter: Player Ratings as Parisians Claim Record-Breaking Champions League Final Win
arts.sum: Player ratings from in PSG’s 5–0 victory over Inter in the 2025 Champions League final.
